The signal depends on external factor analysis logic that cannot be expressed using only price, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, vol_ratio_20, hvol_20, india_vix, or bar properties. This is a regime-identification rule requiring ML/statistical analysis, not a technical indicator-based rule.
